subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Thou Who art the Possessor of forgiveness, clemency, and benevolence! Verily, this is a servant who hath associated himself with one whom Thou didst encompass with the glances of Thine all-merciful eyes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب یا ذا المغفره و العفو و الاحسان ان هذا عبد انتسب لمن شملته بلحظات اعین حمانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
